output.context: Targeted design QA after two fixes: (1) added text-white to logo container for SVG visibility, (2) changed self-stretch to self-center for vertical centering

screenshotComparison.message: All 12 screenshots (3 browsers x 4 widths) are pixel-identical to previous capture, confirming fixes are deployed and stable

compositionCheck.desktop: Rounded charcoal nav bar with white IGNITE logo (bee icon + wordmark) on the left, vertically centered. Right column contains utility row (search + SEP link) and nav items row. Overall shape, proportions, and visual weight match Figma.
compositionCheck.mobile: Rounded charcoal bar with SEP button above, then logo + hamburger row. Logo is white and vertically centered within the row. Matches Figma mobile closed state.

focusAreaResults.observation: The IGNITE logo (bee icon + wordmark) renders as white on the dark charcoal (#1e1e1c) background across all breakpoints and browsers. The inline SVG correctly inherits currentColor as white via the text-white class.

The logo is vertically centered within the nav bar, not stretched to fill both rows. On desktop, it sits at the vertical midpoint of the two-row right column. On mobile, it is centered between the edges of the row. The self-center class produces the correct alignment matching Figma.
Desktop logo appears approximately 58px tall, matching Figma's 57.685px. Mobile logo appears approximately 26px tall, matching Figma's 25.599px.

Header layout matches Figma at all breakpoints (375, 768, 1024, 1440). Desktop shows rounded bar with logo left, utility+nav right. Mobile shows SEP button above, logo+hamburger below. No layout regressions detected.
All 12 screenshots are pixel-identical across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit. Zero cross-browser rendering differences.

All header variations on the test page (full content, minimal content, hide on scroll desktop+mobile, hide on scroll desktop only, not fixed on scroll, submenu alignment right, many nav items/overflow, long submenu items, SEP link only) render correctly with no regressions from the class changes.

desktop1440.typography: PASS - Nav items are uppercase General Sans Medium, utility row text matches Figma. IGNITE wordmark is white and clearly legible.
desktop1440.colors: PASS - Nav bar background is dark charcoal (#1e1e1c), all text is white, search border is white, SEP link text is white with arrow icon.
desktop1440.spacing: PASS - Nav bar padding visually matches Figma's 16px 32px. Gaps between nav items appear consistent with 32px spec. Utility row gap consistent with 16px spec.
desktop1440.layout: PASS - Two-row right column layout (utility row top, nav row bottom) with logo vertically centered on the left. Proportions match Figma.
desktop1440.borderRadius: PASS - Nav bar has visible rounded corners matching the 25px border-radius from Figma.

mobile375.typography: PASS - IGNITE wordmark is white and clearly visible at the smaller size. SEP button text is uppercase.
mobile375.colors: PASS - Dark charcoal background, white text, consistent with Figma.
mobile375.spacing: PASS - Padding and internal spacing appear consistent with Figma mobile spec.
mobile375.layout: PASS - SEP button as full-width pill above, then logo+hamburger row below. Logo is vertically centered in its row.
mobile375.borderRadius: PASS - Rounded pill shape on SEP button and rounded nav bar matching Figma.
